06 = Indian Health Service — Provider-based Facility. A facility or location, owned and operated by 
the Indian Health Service, which provides diagnostic, therapeutic (surgical and non-surgical), 
and rehabilitation services rendered by, or under the supervision of, physicians to American 
Indians and Alaska Natives admitted as inpatients or outpatients.
